response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive experience as a full-stack engineer with over 12 years of relevant work, including roles as a Staff Software Engineer and Senior Software Developer across multiple industries. His expertise aligns closely with the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and secondary technologies (Kotlin/Java). He has proven leadership in architecture, scalability, and testing, with notable contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and event-driven platforms. His educational background and hands-on experience in diverse systems further strengthen his candidacy.
strengths: Deep full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, matching the primary stack requirements
Proven leadership in architecture, scalability, and performance optimization across multiple high-traffic systems
Strong background in AI-agent development and testing frameworks (Vitest, Jest), aligning with modern engineering practices
concerns: Limited explicit experience with Nest.js, which is a primary requirement for this role
No direct mention of PostgreSQL or MySQL in recent roles, though SQL is listed in skills
Some roles emphasize backend-heavy work (e.g., micro-services at Dunnhumby), which may not fully reflect the frontend integration focus of this position

key_factors.factor: Full-stack alignment with primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React)
Lack of explicit Nest.js experience in resume
Proven AI-agent development and testing expertise
